description: Immense serpentine beings with human faces, wielding ancient magic as temple guardians or dark schemers.
subraces: Benevolent temple protectors warding holy relics and resurrecting endlessly to fulfill their charge.
Malevolent spellcasters reforming after death, driven by spite and hunger for domination.
Undead husks of fallen naga, stripped of flesh but retaining a ghost of their former power.
River and lake dwellers hoarding sunken treasure and poisoning intruders with venomous bites.
